problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: If Liquid crystal elastomer actuation is applied to types, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
